case_title: JOHN E. MCINERNEY III VS. IBRAHIM BHARUCHA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-24-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2022 - CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLAIN RECUSES HIMSELF FORM HEARING THIS MATTER. JUDGE PRO TEM DISCLOSES THAT HE AND PLAINTIFF WERE AT ONE TIME WORK ASSOCIATES AT THE SAME LAW FIRM. PLAINTIFF JOHN MCINERNEY III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY III, JOHN E.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOHN E. MCINERNEY III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IBRAHIM BHARUCHA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS HUZAIFAH BHARUCHA (SON). PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-27-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCINERNEY III, JOHN E. AS TO DEFENDANT BHARUCHA, IBRAHIM DBA COW HOLLOW LAUNDROMAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED APR-21-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BHARUCHA, IBRAHIM DBA COW HOLLOW LAUNDROMAT
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY III, JOHN E. AS TO DEFENDANT BHARUCHA, IBRAHIM DBA COW HOLLOW LAUNDROMAT
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY III, JOHN E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BHARUCHA, IBRAHIM DBA COW HOLLOW LAUNDROMAT INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS. ADDITIONALLY, THE SHEETS DEPRECIATION REPLACEMENT COST CALCULATES ACTUAL CASH VALUE OF SHEETS AT ZERO CASH VALUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
